name: standards-refresh.sh per-entry pipeline summary reports the aggregated four-layer clause counters so refresh runs are auditable from stderr alone
command:
OUT=/tmp/cl564-r19-$$; mkdir -p $OUT/out && cat > $OUT/s.html <<'HTML'

Doc

Rule one

prose one.

Rule two

prose two.

HTML cat > $OUT/reg.yaml <e.err; grep -q 'stage5=ok' e.err && grep -q 'clauses_total=2' e.err && grep -q 'fallback=2' e.err && grep -q 'unenforceable=0' e.err && echo stage5-counters-on-stderr 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
